item.author: asksouley

item.title: Express 开发人员和 WHATWG 编辑对访问标题有非常不同的想法。 | Express devs and WHATWG editors have very different ideas about accessing headers.
item.description:
肖恩·布伦诺克

发表于我做了我认为是一个简单的项目。 哦，我错了。

我有一个 ERN（Express/React/Node）应用程序，它只打印浏览器发送到我的服务器的 HTTP 标头。 我认为显示浏览器从我的服务器收到的 HTTP 标头也是一件简单的事情。 事实证明，这个标题列表是一个非常不同的数据结构。

要访问快速服务器上的标头，只需使用req.headers 。 这是一个具有预期键和值的简单对象。

例如，您可以运行fetch('http://example.com/').then(response=>console.log(response.headers)) 。 问题是 Fetch API 返回一个与 Express 的简单对象非常不同的可迭代对象。

要呈现可迭代，我必须使用let headersARR=[]; for (let header of [...response.headers.entries()]) { headersArr.push(header); let headersARR=[]; for (let header of [...response.headers.entries()]) { headersArr.push(header);

我确信 Express 人员和 WHATWG 人员有他们的理由以不同的方式处理 HTTP 标头。 对于我们这些开发人员来说，这只会让事情变得更加困难。

无论如何，您可以在sean.brunnock.com上尝试我的演示并查看源代码以查看具体细节，您可以访问https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Headers了解很多信息有关使用 fetch 访问标头的更多信息。

历久弥新—— 一旦暂停，brunnock 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，brunnock 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，所有由 brunnock 发布的帖子都将被隐藏，并且只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 brunnock 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Sean Brunnock

Posted on Jul 10

I did what I thought would be an easy project. Oh, how wrong I was.

I had an ERN (Express/React/Node) app that simply printed the HTTP headers that your browser sent to my server. I thought it would be a simple matter to also show the HTTP headers that your browser received from my server. It turns out that this list of headers is a very different data structure.

To access the headers on an express server, just use req.headers. It's a simple object with the expected keys and values.

The Fetch API allows your browser to access HTTP headers via response.headers. For example, you could run fetch('http://example.com/').then(response=>console.log(response.headers)). The problem is that the Fetch API returns an iterable which is very different from Express's simple object.

To render the iterable, I have to use let headersARR=[]; for (let header of [...response.headers.entries()]) { headersArr.push(header);

}

.

I'm sure that the Express folks and the WHATWG folks have their reasons for handling HTTP headers differently. It just makes things more difficult for us mere developers.

Anyways, you can try my demo at sean.brunnock.com and view the source to see the nuts and bolts and you can visit https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Headers for lots more info about accessing headers with fetch.

All-time-devlopment - Jul 10

Once suspended, brunnock will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, brunnock will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by brunnock will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If brunnock is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
item.author: brunnock

item.title: 编码时很难找到要听的音乐？ | Hard time finding music to listen to while coding?
item.description:
发表于嘿，您是否厌倦了那些在 YouTube 上随机播放的烦人广告并破坏了整个焦点，或者您只是找不到最好的 lofi 音乐，是吗？ 那么这个博客就是你给我的朋友。

你有我的全部注意力🔥
你正在寻找我的朋友的网站在这里🤯。

如果您的数据有限，您还可以选择切换比特率。

嘿，我喜欢你的封面图片
谢谢😊它是由AI生成的。

你的内容很棒我在哪里可以和你联系✨

一旦暂停，coditdoc 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，coditdoc 将能够再次评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，所有由 coditdoc 发布的帖子都将被隐藏，并且只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 coditdoc 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

Codeitdoc7

Posted on Jul 10

Hey there are you tired of those annoying ads playing randomly on YouTube and ruining whole focus or you just can't find the best lofi music, Yes? Then this blog is you for my friend.

You have my full attention🔥
THE website you are looking my friend is here🤯.

What's so great about Coderadio🙄 What is so great you ask, 24/7 music designed for coding, no ads.

If you have limited data you also get the option to switch bitrate.

Hey I like your cover Image
Thanks 😊 it's generated by AI.

You'r content is great where can I connect with you✨

🚀Github

🌱Instagram

📨[Email] - loficode777@gmail.com

🐦[Twitter]- Soon

Pinesucceed Pvt Ltd - Jun 23

Once suspended, coditdoc will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, coditdoc will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by coditdoc will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If coditdoc is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
item.author: coditdoc
